summary: Tested stock days display on VehicleCard and VehicleDetailModal, plus Kâr/Zarar (Profit/Loss) report in ReportModal. All features working correctly: BMW 320i shows 'Stokta 20 gün', VehicleDetailModal shows 'Giriş Tarihi', 'Eklenme Tarihi', and 'Stokta X gün'. ProfitLoss report has all required columns and summary cards.

issues: Console warnings about Recharts dimensions (width/height -1) on initial render - cosmetic only
Console hydration warnings about <span> elements inside table/select - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Frontend: VehicleCard shows 'Stokta X gün' for unsold cars - BMW 320i shows 'Stokta 20 gün' - PASSED
Frontend: VehicleCard with data-testid='stock-days-{id}' found - PASSED
Frontend: VehicleCard does NOT show stock days for sold cars - No stock-days elements on sold page - PASSED
Frontend: VehicleDetailModal shows 'Stokta 20 gün' for unsold car - PASSED
Frontend: ReportModal has 'Kâr/Zarar' tab with data-testid='report-type-profitloss' - PASSED
Frontend: ProfitLoss report title is 'Stok Araç Kâr/Zarar Raporu' - PASSED
Frontend: ProfitLoss report shows all 9 table columns (Araç, Plaka, Alış, Giderler, Maliyet, Satış, Kâr/Zarar, Gün, Satan) - PASSED
Frontend: ProfitLoss report shows all 4 summary cards (Toplam Alış, Toplam Satış, Araç Giderleri, Net Kâr/Zarar) - PASSED
Frontend: ProfitLoss report has data-testid='profitloss-table' - PASSED
Frontend: ProfitLoss report has data-testid='profitloss-total' - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: VehicleCard.jsx (lines 208-215): Stock days calculation and display correctly shows 'Stokta X gün' only when car.status !== 'Satıldı' and entry_date exists
VehicleDetailModal.jsx (lines 111-122): Correctly displays 'Giriş Tarihi', 'Eklenme Tarihi', 'Stokta X gün' for unsold, and 'Stokta Kaldı X gün' for sold cars
ReportModal.jsx (lines 13-21): reportTypes array includes profitloss with TrendingUp icon
ReportModal.jsx (lines 303-344): profitLossData calculation correctly computes profit = salePrice - (purchasePrice + carExpenses)
ReportModal.jsx (lines 546-598): Profit/Loss table has all required columns with correct data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Used existing BMW 320i test car (id: 7bbf72dc-0174-496f-9187-942106d63c21) with entry_date=2026-02-15
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock days feature fully working. VehicleCard shows 'Stokta X gün' in bottom-right with data-testid='stock-days-{id}'. VehicleDetailModal shows 'Giriş Tarihi', 'Eklenme Tarihi', and stock days info. Kâr/Zarar report accessible via Raporlar sidebar -> click 'Kâr/Zarar' tab (data-testid='report-type-profitloss'). Report shows table with columns: Araç, Plaka, Alış, Giderler, Maliyet, Satış, Kâr/Zarar, Gün, Satan. Summary cards: Toplam Alış, Toplam Satış, Araç Giderleri, Net Kâr/Zarar. To test with data, need to sell a car first within the date range. Login: test-soldby@emergent.com/password

mocked_apis.Email verification: MOCKED - verification code displayed on screen
